x.description: Number of employees (out of 20 polled) who favor unionization, modeled as a binomial random variable with n=20 trials and success probability p=0.60

P_x_leq_12.description: Cumulative binomial probability P(x ≤ 12) read from Table I at n=20, k=12, p=.60, used directly in the calculation P(x > 12) = 1 - 0.584 = 0.416
